Rebreather
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2006 at 4:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1598199352742
106 posts
My cha is 171 and it only cost me 1946p8g to get enough pieces to make 2 rebreathers that are needed for the warr epic 1.0.
▲ Page top
epic2.0
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2004 at 4:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591814470984
6 posts
from what ive been reading it sounds like you have to do epic 1 b4 you can do 2.0
▲ Page top
RE: epic2.0
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2004 at 7:15 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591776864133
Sage
86 posts
You don't need to have your epic 1.0 to do the 2.0, but you will have to do a couple extra tasks (3 kills and some hand ins) before you can start at the same spot.

A nice quest outline for both 1.0 and non-epic warriors is available here.
▲ Page top
Epic 2.0 and you!
QuoteReply
# Sep 01 2004 at 7:35 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591793169649
View User Forum
Scholar
31 posts
With the advent of "Epic 2.0", these are going to start going back up in pricing. (Part of the Warrior Epic, incase you didn't realize)

I worked on Geerlok Fermentation Device prior to doing Rebreathers because it's cheap, easy to get the components and will take you to 215 in tinkering.

Just my 2cp. :)

Edited, Wed Sep 1 08:38:52 2004

Probably going to be easier to skip Epic 1 and just do Epic 2.

▲ Page top
Only Gnomes tinker
QuoteReply
# Dec 29 2001 at 12:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591773595944
4 posts
I hope nobody has tryed to tinker this when they wern't a 16+ Gnome, only we have the skill and only we can raise the skill, goto http://www.eqportal.com/tinkering/ if you are a 16+ Gnome interested in tinkering stuff. Beware though, not everything works and many great gnomish contraptions have been nerfed E.G. tinkered pets and the night vision goggles.

Gnomish cultural armor is tinkered not Smithed FYI
▲ Page top
proc

# Feb 08 2002 at 7:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758837302
8 posts
The Proc is Permanent
▲ Page top
RE: tinkering
QuoteReply
# Oct 31 2001 at 7:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767970340
10 posts
To find information about how to tinker, check out EQTraders.com

Basically, buy a toolkit, and combine the ingredients. Just like any other tradeskill. To my knowledge, the toolkit only sells in Ak'Anon, from a vendor by the forge.
▲ Page top
RE: tinkering
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2004 at 11:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592761168928
94 posts
You can also get the Deluxe Toolbox from PoK (not sure if it can be used for tinkering, but i presume so) from a gnome in the building behind the main bank
▲ Page top
RE: tinkering
QuoteReply
# Oct 08 2002 at 3:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
The old 8 slot toolkits can be bought in Akanon, or smithed. There's also a new 10 slot toolbox that you need to make most of the Velious or later recipes that have more than 8 ingredients; it's sold in the gnome pirate outpost in Iceclad Ocean.
▲ Page top
tinkering

How do you make this
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2001 at 12:10 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I know you have to tinker it but what components do you need?
▲ Page top
RE: How do you make this
QuoteReply
# Jul 11 2001 at 12:45 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592249475779
Scholar
148 posts
Visit the following site for timkering recipes:

http://www.eqportal.com/tinkering/

Browse around for your entertainment

Or if you are too lazy to go there:
1 Aqualung (recipe below)
1 Lime Coated Meshing
1 Sharkskin Tubing
1 Medium Platemail Helm
1 Firewater
1 Metal Fastening

You make an Aqualung by:
1 Fine Coral Mesh
1 Silk Lined Steel Helm
1 Metal Twine
1 Gnomish Bolts
1 Metal Rod
1 Fresh Fish
▲ Page top
RE: How do you make this
QuoteReply
# Apr 24 2002 at 2:59 PM Rating: Decent
Mackdamess
40 posts
Auqa lung trivials at 145. the rebreather at 175.
